title: Sprint 42 - AI Gateway Tasks
content: ClickUp Sprint 42 Tasks: 1) Implement DLP pipeline intercept (P0), 2) LanceDB ingestion service (P0), 3) RBAC dashboard (P1), 4) MCP Slack connector (P2). Release target: March 2026.

title: 2026 Product Roadmap
content: 2026 Product Roadmap (CONFIDENTIAL): Q1 - Semantic similarity engine v1. Q2 - AI Security Gateway v2.0 public launch. Q3 - MCP connector expansion (Slack, Notion, Gmail, Drive). Q4 - Enterprise SSO and SOC2 audit completion.
